# thoth_webhook_settings (Resource)

Manages tenant webhook settings.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `test_webhook_on_apply` (Boolean) Run webhook test endpoint after applying settings.
- `webhook_enabled` (Boolean) Enable outbound webhook delivery.
- `webhook_secret` (String, Sensitive) Webhook signing secret.
- `webhook_url` (String) Outbound webhook URL.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) Terraform resource identifier (tenant ID).
- `tenant_id` (String) Tenant ID resolved from provider configuration.
- `updated_at` (String) Last update timestamp returned by GovAPI.
